creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 176611
nordlicht.diff

This is the combination of these three commits:

https://github.com/nordlicht/nordlicht/commit/5505a1898ab997a23b75553794eff6609447c43b.patch
https://github.com/nordlicht/nordlicht/commit/6e534a0c273756b88eecea7f510b6aa8a62dd789
https://github.com/nordlicht/nordlicht/pull/63/commits/b8f439c2796d6b1de73511c0610aecb31c942790

which should allow nordlicht to build with either ffmpeg 2.x or 3.x
